title: String Methods
content:
### String Methods

Python strings have many built-in methods.

---

### Case Methods

| Method | Example | Result |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `.upper()` | `"hello".upper()` | `"HELLO"` |
| `.lower()` | `"HELLO".lower()` | `"hello"` |
| `.title()` | `"hello world".title()` | `"Hello World"` |
| `.capitalize()` | `"hello".capitalize()` | `"Hello"` |
| `.swapcase()` | `"Hello".swapcase()` | `"hELLO"` |

---

### Check Methods

| Method | Example | Result |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `.isalpha()` | `"abc".isalpha()` | `True` |
| `.isdigit()` | `"123".isdigit()` | `True` |
| `.isalnum()` | `"abc123".isalnum()` | `True` |
| `.isspace()` | `"   ".isspace()` | `True` |
| `.startswith("H")` | `"Hello".startswith("H")` | `True` |
| `.endswith("!")` | `"Hello!".endswith("!")` | `True` |

---

### Find and Replace

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `.find("lo")` | Returns index of first occurrence (-1 if not found) |
| `.index("lo")` | Like find but raises error if not found |
| `.count("l")` | Counts occurrences |
| `.replace("old", "new")` | Replaces all occurrences |

---

### Trim Methods

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `.strip()` | Remove whitespace from both ends |
| `.lstrip()` | Remove from left |
| `.rstrip()` | Remove from right |
| `.strip(".,!")` | Remove specific characters |

---

### Split and Join

| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `.split(",")` | Split into list by delimiter |
| `.rsplit()` | Split from right |
| `.splitlines()` | Split by newlines |
| `" ".join(list)` | Join list into string |

---

> **Remember:** Methods return **new** strings -- the original string is never modified.
codeExample:
text = "  Hello, World!  "

print(text.strip())
print(text.upper())
print(text.replace("World", "Python"))
print(text.split(", "))
print(text.count("l"))
print(text.find("World"))
print(text.isalpha())
print("123".isdigit())
print(text.startswith("  He"))

quiz.question: Which method checks if a string contains only digits?
